title: Sanji Faces the Choice to Leave — Part 4
scene: On pages 13–16, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. After the fight, the Baratie shifts from survival to Sanji’s unresolved bond with Zeff and the cooks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There ain't no chairs for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Heh heh.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just eat on the floor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No chairs!? This is a restaurant, how's that freakin' possible!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Fine, whatever.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Some- thing's strange about them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're always strange.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey, who was the one in charge,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: of making this morning's soup!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, that'd be me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Pretty good, right? I made it especially g...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: How the hell am I supposed to pass this crap down my stomach!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: What is this, pig feed!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Does proper human food not suit you, you damn racoon?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ha, this is pure crap of the highest quality. Makes me wanna puke!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did you put actual shit in this or what?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm perfectly confident about my soup.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Maybe it's your damn tongue that's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: YUCK!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: No way we can eat this filth! Just throw it out!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: SPIT, SPIT! EWW, TERRIBLE! JUST TERRIBLE!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The hell do you think you're all doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What did you...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You being the assistant head chef was always just a sham! It's only because you've been here the longest!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm sick of your violent ways.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If something tastes bad, then it's my right to say it's bad.

dialogue.speaker: Baratie cooks
dialogue.text: Owner!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Geezer!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: What's with this disgusting soup? Is it supposed to taste like sludge or what!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: We'd go out of business if we served this to the customers!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don't joke with me, you damn geezer!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: How's this any different from the soup you make!? Well!? Speak up!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: The soup I make...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't get cocky!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
